modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Credit card machine not connecting to network, EMV key load error.

full_description_text: 
El terminal de tarjeta de crédito no está funcionando correctamente. Se reporta que no se conecta a la red y muestra un error que indica que se requiere una carga de clave EMV. Esto está afectando las transacciones y la operación normal.
short_description: Credit card machine not connecting to network, EMV key load error.
description: El terminal de tarjeta de crédito no está funcionando correctamente. Se reporta que no se conecta a la red y muestra un error que indica que se requiere una carga de clave EMV. Esto está afectando las transacciones y la operación normal.
